items.title: Run strong local LLMs cheaply
items.oneliner: Hands-on hardware guide shows how to run Qwen locally from a $2k build up to near-Opus setups.

items.title: Self-host a private metasearch engine
items.oneliner: Cloneable metasearch engine aggregates Google and DuckDuckGo results without tracking, with full install and config docs.

items.title: Diagnose car faults from audio
items.oneliner: Open pipeline classifies engine problems from phone recordings, with CLAP embeddings and AUROC 0.93 on clean audio.

items.title: Boot a Windows kernel in-browser
items.oneliner: Rust kernel and tiny emulator run Windows drivers in a browser tab using a 4 MB OS image.

items.title: Use a smarter Git-compatible VCS
items.oneliner: jj v0.43 adds jj run for executing commands across changesets, plus better fetch and rebase behavior.

items.title: Build retro Nintendo-style web interfaces
items.oneliner: Installable CSS framework recreates Nintendo DS and DS Lite UI components for web apps, including clock and calendar.

items.title: Auto-dock a Steam Controller
items.oneliner: Browser-based OpenCV and WebHID project pilots a Steam Controller onto its magnetic charger with live telemetry.

items.title: Try a new systems language
items.oneliner: Dependency-free language ships a VM, goroutines, ARC-style memory management, and guides for Rust and Go developers.

items.title: Fix broken full-bleed CSS layouts
items.oneliner: Practical CSS walkthrough shows scrollbar-safe full-bleed patterns using containment, logical properties, and overflow fixes.

items.title: Learn HotSpot bit-level JIT optimization
items.oneliner: Deep JVM tutorial explains how known-bits analysis removes useless masks and unlocks optimizations range checks miss.
